description: You are the Executive Assistant to the CFO. You previously blocked out three tentative times for the 'Q3 Budget Review' next week to give the CEO options. The CEO's office has just confirmed that the Wednesday afternoon slot (2:00 PM) works best. Finalize the schedule for next week by deleting the 'Hold: Q3 Budget Review' events on Tuesday and Thursday, and renaming the confirmed Wednesday 2:00 PM event to 'Q3 Budget Review'.
